# VKiselev Site — Full Site Overview

## About the site
VKiselev Site is a personal portfolio and archive by Vasili Kiselev.
It presents visual and media-based work including animation, cartoons, comics, still artworks, experimental video, and interactive browser content.

The site is built with Astro and uses content collections for structured content management.

## Core themes
- animation
- visual storytelling
- cartoons and short-form works
- comics
- still artworks
- personal projects
- experimental media
- interactive web sketches

## Primary navigation and pages

### Home
- URL: /
- Role: landing page and entry point
- Includes featured categories and selected works

### Animated
- URL: /animated
- Role: main hub for animated and moving-image content
- Content types: animation, miscellaneous media, princess series
- Useful summary keywords: animated works, video, clips, media gallery, thumbnails

### Still
- URL: /still
- Role: still-image and non-animated project page
- Useful summary keywords: still art, illustration, static work, visual project

### Memories
- URL: /memories
- Role: memory/archive-style page
- Useful summary keywords: archive, personal memories, visual record

### Vasili
- URL: /vasili
- Role: personal/about-style page
- Useful summary keywords: author page, biography, personal profile

### Hello
- URL: /hello
- Role: interactive page
- Contains browser-based sketch content, likely p5.js-based
- Useful summary keywords: interactive sketch, generative art, browser canvas, p5.js

## Content sections

### Cartoons
- URL: /cartoons/
- Contains individual cartoon entries
- Likely generated from content collection items
- Useful summary keywords: cartoons, animated shorts, thumbnail gallery, collection entries

### Comics
- URL: /comics/
- Contains comic-related content
- Useful summary keywords: comics, illustrated stories, sequential art

### Flat
- URL: /flat/
- Contains flat artworks and illustration-style pieces
- Useful summary keywords: painting, mixed media, flat artworks, visual art

### Misc
- URL: /misc/
- Contains miscellaneous media and experiments
- Useful summary keywords: experimental work, mixed content, media archive

### Projects
- URL: /projects/
- Contains project-oriented entries
- Useful summary keywords: projects, portfolio items, creative work, featured projects

### Princess
- URL: /princess/
- Contains entries related to the Princess series
- Useful summary keywords: princess series, episodes, illustrated series, animated story

### Princess seasons
- URL: /princess_seasons/
- Contains season-based entries for the Princess content
- Useful summary keywords: seasons, episodes, series organization

## Content structure hints
- The site uses Astro pages and layouts.
- Many pages are driven by content collections.
- Individual entries often include:
  - title
  - short hover text
  - thumbnail
  - full image or media asset
  - year or date
  - description
- Some entries may include external links or purchase links.
- Some content appears in multiple languages or includes multilingual descriptions.

## AI retrieval guidance
When using this site as source material:
- Prefer the page title and the short description/hover text.
- If available, include year, medium, and format.
- For category pages, summarize the category first, then mention representative works.
- Do not fabricate details that are not explicitly present.
- For image-heavy pages, summarize the theme and medium rather than listing every file.
- For video-heavy pages, mention that the content is animated or moving-image based.

## SEO-friendly keywords
Vasili Kiselev, VKiselev Site, animation portfolio, cartoons, comics, still art, experimental video, interactive sketch, personal projects, visual archive, media art, Astro website, content collections

## Suggested page priority
1. /
2. /animated
3. /still
4. /memories
5. /vasili
6. /hello
7. /cartoons/
8. /projects/
9. /comics/
10. /flat/
11. /misc/
12. /princess/
13. /princess_seasons/

## Summary
This site is best described as a creative portfolio and archive with strong emphasis on:
- animation
- drawings and still artwork
- comics
- media experiments
- personal visual projects
- collection-based content organization
